testcase.name: @stynx/reference-api e2e audit > records a mutating route in audit.log, audit.events, and the hash-chain columns
@stynx/reference-api e2e audit > allows an audit reader to query the log and keeps credential material out of audit metadata
@stynx/reference-api e2e audit > denies audit-log access to an actor without platform audit permission
@stynx/reference-api e2e audit > keeps audit queries scoped by tenant filters across tenant records
@stynx/reference-api e2e auth and permissions > logs in through the reference auth route, verifies the token, publishes JWKS, and audits the session
@stynx/reference-api e2e auth and permissions > denies missing permissions, grants write permission, invalidates the cache, and revokes it again
@stynx/reference-api e2e auth and permissions > keeps permission introspection and record access scoped by tenant
@stynx/reference-api e2e documents > uploads, completes, and downloads a document with audit rows
@stynx/reference-api e2e documents > denies document writes to the read-only viewer actor
@stynx/reference-api e2e documents > isolates documents across tenants through HTTP and RLS
@stynx/reference-api e2e documents > soft-deletes, restores, and hard-deletes document object versions
@stynx/reference-api e2e error matrix > runs an audited happy-path mutation that anchors the matrix
@stynx/reference-api e2e error matrix > returns canonical authentication, authorization, and idempotency errors
@stynx/reference-api e2e error matrix > surfaces read-only transaction violations through a read-only route
@stynx/reference-api e2e error matrix > rejects hard delete without hard-delete permission and does not write a hard-delete audit row
@stynx/reference-api e2e error matrix > maps cross-tenant record access to 404 and preserves RLS isolation
@stynx/reference-api e2e flow design and runtime > runs design authoring, runtime execution, form completion, signals, analytics, and audit rows
@stynx/reference-api e2e flow design and runtime > denies unauthenticated and missing-permission design mutations
@stynx/reference-api e2e flow design and runtime > keeps flow runs hidden across tenant-scoped RLS reads
@stynx/reference-api e2e i18n > updates tenant locale overrides over HTTP and persists them in tenant settings
@stynx/reference-api e2e i18n > uses the tenant settings locale when no supported Accept-Language header is present
@stynx/reference-api e2e i18n > returns a validation error for malformed override JSON
@stynx/reference-api e2e i18n > keeps tenant override reads scoped by tenant and RLS
@stynx/reference-api e2e idempotency > replays a matching record creation without duplicating record rows
@stynx/reference-api e2e idempotency > rejects divergent replay for the same tenant, actor, route, and idempotency key
@stynx/reference-api e2e idempotency > scopes identical idempotency keys by tenant and preserves RLS isolation
@stynx/reference-api e2e idempotency > allows a reused public idempotency key to execute again after durable and cache expiry
@stynx/reference-api e2e privacy > exports a subject bundle with live and archive privacy rows
@stynx/reference-api e2e privacy > rejects an export request without a subject or tenant selector
@stynx/reference-api e2e privacy > keeps tenant-filtered exports and direct RLS reads isolated
@stynx/reference-api e2e privacy > reports retention candidates without deleting archive rows
@stynx/reference-api e2e privacy > erases a subject across live and archive stores and writes LGPD audit rows
@stynx/reference-api e2e profile and preferences > creates the user profile through dev login, verifies the session, and persists preferences
@stynx/reference-api e2e profile and preferences > rejects blank profile identity input before creating a user
@stynx/reference-api e2e profile and preferences > keeps preference reads and writes scoped to the active tenant
@stynx/reference-api e2e profile and preferences > uses the stored locale preference when resolving localized profile copy
@stynx/reference-api e2e rate limit > allows the first high-cost tenant request and records the audit row
@stynx/reference-api e2e rate limit > blocks the second same-tenant lock request with retry headers
@stynx/reference-api e2e rate limit > denies the viewer before a write can consume the tenant bucket
@stynx/reference-api e2e rate limit > keeps rate-limit buckets and lock rows isolated across tenants
@stynx/reference-api e2e records and notes > runs happy CRUD for records and notes with audit rows
@stynx/reference-api e2e records and notes > denies write routes to the read-only viewer actor
@stynx/reference-api e2e records and notes > isolates records and notes across tenants through HTTP and RLS
@stynx/reference-api e2e records and notes > soft-deletes and restores notes and records with archive assertions
@stynx/reference-api e2e role and permission management > creates a tenant role, attaches a permission, assigns it, revokes it, and audits RBAC changes
@stynx/reference-api e2e role and permission management > keeps tenant-scoped role rows isolated by RLS
@stynx/reference-api e2e sessions management > exchanges a Cognito login for an active STYNX session and exposes public JWKS
@stynx/reference-api e2e sessions management > denies session inspection to an actor without platform session-management permission
@stynx/reference-api e2e sessions management > revokes another active session and records the session mirror/audit trail
@stynx/reference-api e2e sessions management > logs out the current route session while leaving a sibling session active
@stynx/reference-api e2e sessions management > keeps mirrored active sessions isolated by tenant under RLS
@stynx/reference-api e2e tenancy > lists, provisions, reads, and updates tenants with audit rows
@stynx/reference-api e2e tenancy > suspends, archives, and purges tenants with lifecycle audit rows
@stynx/reference-api e2e tenancy > denies platform tenant operations when the platform-admin guard is disabled
@stynx/reference-api e2e tenancy > keeps tenant rows isolated under tenant-scoped RLS reads
@stynx/reference-api e2e work items > runs happy create, update, read, and list for work items, entries, and locks with audit rows
@stynx/reference-api e2e work items > denies work-item writes to the viewer actor
@stynx/reference-api e2e work items > isolates work items, entries, and locks across tenants through HTTP and RLS
@stynx/reference-api e2e work items > soft-deletes and restores work-item entries, locks, and items with archive assertions
